question: Return the full record for Vehicle @vehicle001.
What is the produced time of Vehicle @vehicle002 if it was produced in October 2015?
cypher: MATCH (v:Vehicle {identifier: '@vehicle002'}) WHERE v.producedTime >= '2015-10-01 00:00:00' AND v.producedTime < '2015-11-01 00:00:00' RETURN v.producedTime

question: What is the name of Vehicle @vehicle003?
Show Part @part001 only when its status is active.
What is the current status of Part @part002?
Return Part @part003 together with its current specification.
Show Personnel @personnel001 if its name is @name001.
Return all properties of Personnel @personnel002 if role as Operator.
Give me the basic profile of Supplier @supplier001.
Return all properties of Supplier @supplier002.
Show VehicleVariant only if its power is 96kw.
What is the powertrain type and trim level of VehicleVariant @vehiclevariant001?
Return the basic details of VehicleVariant @vehiclevariant002.
What is the name of VehicleFamily @vehiclefamily001?
Show Equipment @equipment001 if its current status is Active.
Return the key properties of Equipment @equipment001.
Show details for Tool @equipment002.
Show Production Order @productionorder001 if it is currently Active.
Show the batch details for Part Batch @partbatch001.
Show Operational Task Task011015-A-1-001-01 if it started after October 2015.
Which VehicleFamily does Vehicle @vehicle001 belong to?
Which Production Order related to Vehicle @vehicle004?
Which Production Plan related to Vehicle @vehicle004?
Which Personnel participated in Operational Task Task011015-A-1-001-01, and role is Operator?
Which Production Order did PartBatch @partbatch002 used for?
Which Operation related to PartBatch @partbatch003?
Which Operation corresponded to the EquipmentInstance @equipment003?
Which Operational Tasks belonging to Production Process @productionprocess001 start after October 2015-10-03?
Which Vehicles produced by Production Process @productionprocess001 were produced at October 4th, 2015?
cypher: MATCH (pp:ProductionProcess {identifier: '@productionprocess001'})-[:PRODUCES_VEHICLE]->(v:Vehicle) WHERE v.producedTime >= '2015-10-04 00:00:00' and v.producedTime < '2015-10-05 00:00:00' RETURN v

question: Which Operation does Personnel @personnel003 worked on 2015-10-1?
cypher: MATCH (p:Personnel{identifier:'@personnel003'})<-[:HAS_PARTICIPANT]-(ot:OperationalTask)-[:INSTANTIATES_OPERATION]->(:OperationVersion)<-[:CURRENT_VERSION]-(o:Operation) WHERE ot.startTime>='2015-10-01 00:00:00' AND ot.endTime<='2015-10-02 00:00:00' RETURN o AS Operation

question: Which Personnel did Operation @operation001 worked on 2015-10-1?
cypher: MATCH (p:Personnel)<-[:HAS_PARTICIPANT]-(o:OperationalTask)-[:INSTANTIATES_OPERATION]->(:OperationVersion)<-[:CURRENT_VERSION]-(:Operation{identifier:'@operation001'}) WHERE o.startTime>='2015-10-01 00:00:00' AND o.endTime<='2015-10-02 00:00:00' RETURN p

question: Which operations require Part @part004?
Which VehicleVariants in VehicleFamily @vehiclefamily001 have an 96kw power?
Which shop has Euqipment instance @equipmentinstance001?
Which VehicleFamilies is Assembly Shop HLA1A qualified to produce?
Which Vehicles are instances of VehicleVariant @vehiclevariant003 produced after October 3, 2015?
Which active Production Orders are assigned to ManufacturingPlant @productionshop001?
Which Vehicles used Part batch @partbatch004?
Which Operational Tasks does Personnel @personnel003 participate in October 2015?
cypher: MATCH (per:Personnel {identifier: '@personnel003'})<-[:HAS_PARTICIPANT]-(t:OperationalTask) WHERE t.startTime >= '2015-10-01 00:00:00' and t.endTime < '2015-11-1 00:00:00' RETURN t

question: Which plant related to bacth part @partbatch005?
Which VehicleVariant use Part @part005?
Show me vehicle family produced in plant @productionshop001.
Show me order @productionorder001's production plan at 2025-10-01.
cypher: MATCH (po:ProductionOrder{identifier: '@productionorder001'})-[:CURRENT_VERSION]->(:ProductionOrderVersion)-[:INSTANTIATES_PLAN]->(pv:ProductionPlanVersion)<-[:CURRENT_VERSION]-(pp:ProductionPlan) WHERE pv.plannedStartTime >= '2015-10-01 00:00:00' and pv.plannedEndTime < '2015-10-02 00:00:00' RETURN po AS ProductionOrder

question: Which VehicleVariant does Production Order @productionorder001 cover?
What vehicle variant related to operation @operation002?
cypher: MATCH (vv:VehicleVariant)<-[:HAS_VARIANT]-(:VehicleFamily)-[:DESCRIBED_IN]->(:ProductDocument)-[:CURRENT_VERSION]->(pdv:ProductDocumentVersion)<-[:DERIVED_FROM]-(:OperationVersion)<-[:CURRENT_VERSION]-(o:Operation{identifier:'@operation002'}) RETURN vv AS VehicleVariant, o AS Operation

question: Show me the part suppliers related to operation @operation001.
Which VehicleVariants include Part @part006 in their BOM through the part's current specification?
Show me the operations related to part suppliers @supplier003.
Which VehicleVariants in VehicleFamily @vehiclefamily001 have an 81kw power?
Which Operations are applicable to VehicleVariant @vehiclevariant001?
Which plant does the production shop that manufactures Vehicle @vehicle001 belong to?
What production plan covers Vehicle @vehicle001, and which order does that plan fall under?
Which VehicleVariant does Vehicle @vehicle001 belong to, and what VehicleFamily is that variant part of?
Which Vehicles belong to the VehicleVariants under VehicleFamily @vehiclefamily001?
Which Part used by Operation @operation003 in plant @productionshop001?
cypher: MATCH (mp:ManufacturingPlant {identifier: '@productionshop001'})-[:HAS_SHOP]->(:ProductionShop)<-[:QUALIFIED_FOR]-(o:Operation{identifier:'@operation003'})-[:CURRENT_VERSION]->(:OperationVersion)-[:REQUIRES_PART]->(:PartSpecification)<-[:CURRENT_SPECIFICATION]-(p:Part) RETURN DISTINCT mp, o, p

question: Which ProductionPlans are associated with the ProductionOrders assigned to ManufacturingPlant @productionshop001?
Which VehicleVariant do the Vehicles produced by ProductionProcess @productionprocess002 belong to?
cypher: MATCH (pp:ProductionProcess {identifier: '@productionprocess002'})-[:PRODUCES_VEHICLE]->(v:Vehicle)-[:CONFIGURED_TO]->(:VehicleVariantSpecification)<-[:CURRENT_SPECIFICATION]-(vv:VehicleVariant) RETURN DISTINCT pp, v, vv

question: Which ProductionShops are qualified to perform Operations that require Part @part001?
cypher: MATCH (p:Part {identifier: '@part001'})-[:CURRENT_SPECIFICATION]->(:PartSpecification)<-[:REQUIRES_PART]-(:OperationVersion)<-[:CURRENT_VERSION]-(o:Operation)-[:QUALIFIED_FOR]->(ps:ProductionShop) RETURN DISTINCT p, o, ps

question: Which Personnel are assigned to the ProductionProcesses realizing ProductionPlan @productionplan001?
cypher: MATCH (pl:ProductionPlan {identifier: '@productionplan001'})-[:CURRENT_VERSION]->(:ProductionPlanVersion)<-[:REALIZES_PLAN]-(pp:ProductionProcess)-[:HAS_TASK]->(:OperationalTask)-[:HAS_PARTICIPANT]->(per:Personnel) RETURN DISTINCT pl, pp, per

question: Which ProductionOrders are assigned to the ManufacturingPlant that Vehicle @vehicle001 is produced at?
cypher: MATCH (v:Vehicle {identifier: '@vehicle001'})<-[:PRODUCES_VEHICLE]-(:ProductionProcess)-[:REALIZES_PLAN]->(:ProductionPlanVersion)<-[:INSTANTIATES_PLAN]-(:ProductionOrderVersion)<-[:CURRENT_VERSION]-(po:ProductionOrder)-[:ASSIGNED_TO]->(mp:ManufacturingPlant) RETURN DISTINCT v, mp, po

question: Which vehicles were produced in shop HLA1A and are also assigned to production order @productionorder001?
Which operations use Part @part001 and are also performed in AssemblyShop HLA1A?
Which personnel worked on ProductionProcess @productionprocess002 and also handled Vehicle @vehicle001?
Which VehicleVariants belong to VehicleFamily @vehiclefamily001 and are qualified to be produced at AssemblyShop HLA1A?
Which Parts are in the BOM of VehicleVariant @vehiclevariant003 and also supplied by Supplier @supplier001?
Which Operations require Part @part001 and are also applicable to VehicleVariant @vehiclevariant004?
Which Vehicles are produced under ProductionOrder @productionorder001 and belong to VehicleVariant @vehiclevariant004?
Which Vehicles were produced under ProductionPlan @productionplan001 and consumed batch part @partbatch004?
Which ProductionProcesses realize ProductionPlan '@productionplan001 and occur at AssemblyShop HLA1A?
Which Personnel worked on both Vehicle @vehicle001 and Vehicle @vehicle002?
Which operations are related to Part @part001 or Part @part002?
cypher: MATCH (p:Part)-[:CURRENT_SPECIFICATION]->(:PartSpecification)<-[:REQUIRES_PART]-(:OperationVersion)<-[:CURRENT_VERSION]-(o:Operation) WHERE p.identifier IN ['@part001', '@part002'] RETURN DISTINCT o

question: Show me all vehicles produced by ProductionProcess @productionprocess002 or ProductionProcess @productionprocess003.
cypher: MATCH (pp:ProductionProcess)-[:PRODUCES_VEHICLE]->(v:Vehicle) WHERE pp.identifier IN ['@productionprocess002', '@productionprocess003'] RETURN DISTINCT v

question: Which Personnel worked on Vehicle @vehicle001 or Vehicle @vehicle002?
cypher: MATCH (:Vehicle {identifier: '@vehicle001'})<-[:PRODUCES_VEHICLE]-(:ProductionProcess)-[:HAS_TASK]->(:OperationalTask)-[:HAS_PARTICIPANT]->(per:Personnel) RETURN DISTINCT per UNION MATCH (:Vehicle {identifier: '@vehicle002'})<-[:PRODUCES_VEHICLE]-(:ProductionProcess)-[:HAS_TASK]->(:OperationalTask)-[:HAS_PARTICIPANT]->(per:Personnel) RETURN DISTINCT per

question: Which Parts appear in the BOM of VehicleVariant @vehiclevariant003 or VehicleVariant @vehiclevariant001?
cypher: MATCH (vv:VehicleVariant)-[:CURRENT_SPECIFICATION]->(:VehicleVariantSpecification)-[:HAS_BOMITEM]->(:PartSpecification)<-[:CURRENT_SPECIFICATION]-(p:Part) WHERE vv.identifier IN ['@vehiclevariant003', '@vehiclevariant001'] RETURN DISTINCT p

question: Which Parts are supplied by Supplier @supplier001 or Supplier @supplier004?
cypher: MATCH (p:Part)-[:CURRENT_SPECIFICATION]->(:PartSpecification)-[:HAS_SUPPLIER]->(s:Supplier) WHERE s.identifier IN ['@supplier001', '@supplier004'] RETURN DISTINCT p

question: Which Vehicles were produced under ProductionPlan @productionplan001 or worked on by Personnel @productionplan001?
cypher: MATCH (:ProductionPlan {identifier: '@productionplan001'})-[:CURRENT_VERSION]->(:ProductionPlanVersion)<-[:REALIZES_PLAN]-(:ProductionProcess)-[:PRODUCES_VEHICLE]->(v:Vehicle) RETURN DISTINCT v UNION MATCH (:Personnel {identifier: '@productionplan001'})<-[:HAS_PARTICIPANT]-(:OperationalTask)<-[:HAS_TASK]-(:ProductionProcess)-[:PRODUCES_VEHICLE]->(v:Vehicle) RETURN DISTINCT v

question: Which Suppliers were used in producing Vehicle @vehicle005 or under ProductionOrder @productionorder001?
cypher: MATCH (:Vehicle {identifier: '@vehicle005'})<-[:PRODUCES_VEHICLE]-(:ProductionProcess)-[:HAS_TASK]->(:OperationalTask)-[:CONSUMES_PART]->(:PartInstance)-[:SUPPLIED_BY]->(s:Supplier) RETURN DISTINCT s.identifier, s.name UNION MATCH (:ProductionOrder {identifier: '@productionorder001'})-[:CURRENT_VERSION]->(:ProductionOrderVersion)-[:INSTANTIATES_PLAN]->(:ProductionPlanVersion)<-[:REALIZES_PLAN]-(:ProductionProcess)-[:HAS_TASK]->(:OperationalTask)-[:CONSUMES_PART]->(:PartInstance)-[:SUPPLIED_BY]->(s:Supplier) RETURN DISTINCT s.identifier, s.name

question: Which EquipmentInstances were used in producing Vehicle @vehicle001 or Vehicle @vehicle004?
cypher: MATCH (:Vehicle {identifier: '@vehicle001'})<-[:PRODUCES_VEHICLE]-(:ProductionProcess)-[:HAS_TASK]->(:OperationalTask)-[:USE_EQUIPMENT]->(ei:EquipmentInstance) RETURN DISTINCT ei UNION MATCH (:Vehicle {identifier: '@vehicle004'})<-[:PRODUCES_VEHICLE]-(:ProductionProcess)-[:HAS_TASK]->(:OperationalTask)-[:USE_EQUIPMENT]->(ei:EquipmentInstance) RETURN DISTINCT ei

question: Which ProductionShops belong to ManufacturingPlant @productionshop001 or are used by ProductionProcess @productionprocess002?
cypher: MATCH (:ManufacturingPlant {identifier: '@productionshop001'})-[:HAS_SHOP]->(s:ProductionShop) RETURN DISTINCT s UNION MATCH (:ProductionProcess {identifier: '@productionprocess002'})-[:OCCURS_AT]->(s:ProductionShop) RETURN DISTINCT s

question: Which VehicleVariants in VehicleFamily @vehiclefamily001 have 96KW or 81KW powertrains?
cypher: MATCH (:VehicleFamily {identifier: '@vehiclefamily001'})-[:HAS_VARIANT]->(vv:VehicleVariant) WHERE vv.power IN ['96kw', '81kw'] RETURN DISTINCT vv

question: Tell me about Vehicle @vehicle001, ProductionOrder @productionprocess002, and Part @part001.
Which Operations require Part @part001? Also tell me about Vehicle @vehicle001.
Which Suppliers provide Part @part001? Also tell me about VehicleVariant @vehiclevariant004.
Tell me about ManufacturingPlant @productionshop001, VehicleFamily @vehiclefamily001, and Personnel @personnel001.
Which Vehicles are produced under ProductionPlan @productionplan001? Also tell me about Part @part001.
Tell me about AssemblyShop @productionshop002, ProductionOrder @productionprocess002, and VehicleVariant @vehiclevariant004.
Who are the Personnel working on Vehicle @vehicle001? Also tell me about ProductionProcess @productionprocess002.
Which ManufacturingPlants build VehicleFamily @vehiclefamily001? Also tell me about ProductionOrder @productionprocess002.
Tell me about Vehicle @vehicle001, Part @part001, and Personnel @personnel001.
Which VehicleVariants are under VehicleFamily @vehiclefamily001? Also tell me about ProductionProcess @productionprocess002.
What ProductionPlan and ProductionOrder is Vehicle @vehicle006 linked to? Also give me details on Part @part001.
Show me Vehicles that fall under ProductionOrder @productionorder001 through its plan and process. Also tell me about Shop HLA1A.
Which Suppliers provide Parts used in Vehicle @vehicle005? Also show details on ProductionOrder @productionorder001.
Which ProductionOrders cover Vehicles of VehicleVariant @vehiclevariant004? Also give me details on Part @part007.
Who are the Personnel on ProductionProcesses under @productionplan001? Also show details for ManufacturingPlant @productionshop001.
Which ProductionPlans are under productionorders assigned to ManufacturingPlant @productionshop001? Also show VehicleFamily @vehiclefamily001.
Which ProductionShops handle Operations requiring Part @part001? Also show Vehicle @vehicle001.
Which VehicleVariants do Vehicles from ProductionProcess @productionprocess002 belong to? Also show details on ProductionPlan @productionplan001.
Which Vehicles under VehicleFamily @vehiclefamily001 and were assembled using parts from Supplier @supplier005?
Which ProductionOrders orders VehicleVariant @vehiclevariant004, or are assigned to ManufacturingPlant @productionshop001?
cypher: MATCH (:VehicleVariant {identifier: '@vehiclevariant004'})<-[:ORDERS_VARIANT]-(:ProductionOrderVersion)<-[:CURRENT_VERSION]-(po:ProductionOrder) RETURN DISTINCT po UNION MATCH (po:ProductionOrder)-[:ASSIGNED_TO]->(:ManufacturingPlant {identifier: '@productionshop001'}) RETURN DISTINCT po
